cards.rules_text:
Alignment = Sol
2 Mana: Create a 1 endurance creature token anywhere in your front row.
4 Mana: Put an endurance counter on each creature you control.

Alignment = Sol
2 Mana: Conflagor deals 1 damage to target card in play or player.
3 Mana: This turn, if a source you own would deal noncombat damage, that source deals that much damage plus 1 instead.

Alignment = Sol
2 Mana: You gain 2 life.
3 Mana: You may destroy an asset you control. If you do, draw two cards.

Alignment = Lun
3 Mana: Draw a card. Activate as a react.

Alignment = Lun
The first card each opponent plays each turn other than cards they play to their sanctum costs an additional 1 Mana to play.

Alignment = Lun
Each player starts with an additional 10 life.
The information victory condition is increased by 10.
The book victory condition is increased by 2.

Alignment = Astra
3 Mana: Draw a card, then discard a card. You may play the discarded card next turn.

Alignment = Astra
3 Mana: Swap a book you control's position with another connected card. If this ability would move a card with mana value 4 or greater out of a sanctum, that card doesn't leave that sanctum. [i](The card entering still enters.)[/i]

Alignment = Astra
When choosing one or more modes, you may choose an additional mode.

Alignment = Terra
2 Mana: Put an endurance counter on target card you control.

Alignment = Terra
1 Mana, Destroy a card you control: Put a card that shares a type with it from your discard pile into your hand.

Alignment = Terra
3 Mana: Target creature you control gains killstrike until end of turn.
Win Condition = Seven or more cards have left play since the end of your last turn.

Alignment = Null
3 Mana: Put an endurance counter on up to one target creature of each alignment.

Alignment = Null
Unaligned creatures enter with an additional endurance counter.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 2

Endurance = 3
Attack Bonus = -1
Swift
1 Lun Mana, Tap: Put Increasing Moon Owls on the bottom of your deck, then search your deck for a card named Full Moon Owls, put it where Increasing Moon Owls was, then shuffle.

Endurance = 4
Attack Bonus = -1
Swift
1 Lun Mana, Tap: Put Full Moon Owls on the bottom of your deck, then search your deck for a card named Decreasing Moon Owls, put it where Full Moon Owls was, then shuffle.

Endurance = 3
Attack Bonus = -1
Swift
1 Lun Mana, Tap: Put Decreasing Moon Owls on the bottom of your deck, then search your deck for two cards named New Moon Owls, reveal them, put one where Decreasing Moon Owls was and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

Cost = 3 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance = 5

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance = 3

Incinerate deals 3 damage to each card in play.

Endurance = 2

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Endurance = 2
When Tome of Knowledge enters play, draw a card.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 2
When Tome of Diplomacy enters play, create a 1 endurance creature token anywhere in your front row.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 2
When Tome of Chance enters play, roll a d6. If it was a 4, 5, or 6, create a token that's a copy of Tome of Chance anywhere in your front row.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance = 2
When Tome of Instinct enters play, put two endurance counters on another card you control.

Cost = 1 Mana
Endurance = 2

Cost = 2 Mana
Endurance = 2
When Tome of Void enters play, add 2 Mana.

Cost = 2 Mana
Endurance = 2
When Tome of Equilibrium enters play, add 1 Mana of any alignment.

Cost = 1 Mana
When Old Debris enters play, draw a card.
1 Mana, Destroy Old Debris: Add 2 Mana in any combination of alignments.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Endurance = 2
At the end of each opponent's turn, if they didn't play any cards other than to their sanctum, draw a card.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Endurance = 2
Whenever you draw a card, you gain 1 life and 1 information.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 2
Whenever you play a card for the third time each turn, copy that card.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 2
When Conflagor's Tome enters play, it deals 3 damage to target card in play or player.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 2
Whenever an asset you control leaves play, you gain 2 life and 2 information.

Cost = 3 Mana
Endurance = 2
When Equilens's Tome enters play, look at the top two cards of your deck. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your discard pile.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance 2
When Gaeaea's Tome enters play, remove any number of endurance counters from cards you control. Draw half that many cards, rounded down.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance 2
Whenever a card enters or leaves your discard pile, put an endurance counter on Harvatia's Tome.
1 Mana: Move an endurance counter from Harvatia's Tome to another card you control.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Endurance 2
Reactive
When Hypnor's Tome enters, choose a card or ability on the stack. Its controller may pay 2 Mana. If they don't, put it into its owner's discard pile. [i](If it's an ability it disappears.)[/i]

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance 2
Book cards you play cost 1 Mana less to play. This effect can't reduce their cost to less than 1 total Mana.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance 2
When Radion's Tome enters play, put an endurance counter on each card you control.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance 2
1 Mana, Destroy Venolek's Tome: Destroy another target card you control.

Cost = 3 Mana
Endurance 2
Whenever an Unaligned creature you control enters for the second time each turn, draw a card.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance 2
When Yanite's Tome enters play, choose one —
• Draw a card.
• Each opponent discards a card.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Ember deals 3 damage to target player or card in play.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 2
Whenever you play a noncreature card, put an endurance counter on Stormcaller.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Reactive
Create two 1 endurance creature tokens anywhere in your front row.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Create three 1 endurance creature tokens anywhere in your front row.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Reactive
Infolink

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 1
When Captain enters play, create a 1 endurance creature token.

You gain 3 information. Draw a card.

Cost = 4 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Put target card in a discard pile into play anywhere in your front row.

Cost = 1 Astra Mana
Add 1 Mana. Draw a card.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Add 3 Astra Mana.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Reactive
Draw two cards.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 1
Whenever you play your second card each turn, draw a card.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 2

Alignment = Lun
2 Mana: Target creature you control gains infolink until end of turn.
3 Mana: You gain 2 information.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
You gain 2 information.
Draw two cards.

Cost = 4 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Endurance = 4
Swift
Whenever a Bird you control enters play, move any number of endurance counters from Owl Queen to it.
Whenever a Bird you control leaves play, put all endurance counters that were on it onto Owl Queen.
2 Lun Mana, Remove five endurance counters from creatures you control: You gain 4 information.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Put three endurance counters on target creature.

Cost = 4 Mana
Destroy target creature.

Cost = 1 Mana
Endurance = 1
Sprint 1

Cost = 1 Mana
Endurance = 2
Attack Bonus = -2

Cost = 3 Mana
Endurance = 1
As Laborer enters your sanctum, choose an alignment.
Laborer taps for the chosen alignment while in your sanctum.

Cost = 1 Mana
Endurance = 3

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Choose one —
• You gain 5 information.
• Distribute 4 endurance counters among cards you control.
• Draw a card.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Choose one —
• Target player creates two 1 endurance creature tokens.
• Put an endurance counter on each of up to two target creatures you control.
• Put an infolink counter on target creature you control.

Cost = 3 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Endurance = 1
Prophet enters your sanctum tapped with two exertion counters.
While in your sanctum, Prophet has “1 Mana, Tap: Put an endurance counter on Prophet.”
Once each turn, if Prophet is in your sanctum, you may play a card with mana value less than the number of counters on Prophet from your hand without paying its cost.

Cost = 3 Mana, 3 Lun Mana
When Puremind enters play, you may set aside a card from your hand.
You may play cards that share a type with the set aside card from your hand without paying their costs.

Cost = 4 Mana, 3 Lun Mana
You may move creatures from your sanctum without paying their costs.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 2
When Starblade enters play, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

Cost = 3 Lun Mana
Reactive
Put target card on the stack into its owner's discard pile.
At the start of your next turn, each player draws a card.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Reactive
Put target noncreature card on the stack into its owner's discard pile.

Cost = 1 Mana, 2 Astra Mana
Reactive
Destroy target creature.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Two target creatures in opposing front rows each deal damage equal to their attack value to the other.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Reactive
Remove target ability from the stack.

Cost = 1 Lun Mana
Each opponent plays with the top card of their deck revealed.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance = 2
Monkey creatures you control have swift. [i](Including this.)[/i]

Alignment = Null
4 Mana: Target creature you control's name becomes Syntharosite. Activate only if you control no creatures named Syntharosite.
Creatures you control named Syntharosite have attack bonus equal to their endurance counters minus 4.
At the start of your turn, set target creature you control named Syntharosite to 4 endurance counters.

Cost = 1 Lun Mana
Repeat this three times: Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put it into your hand.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand onto your deck in any order.

Cost = 1 Lun Mana
Look at the top seven cards of your deck and put them back in any order.

Cost = 4 Mana, 2 Astra Mana
Endurance 1
Alpha Wolf enters play with an additional endurance counter for each other Wolf you control.
Whenever another Wolf you control enters play, put an endurance counter on Alpha Wolf.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance 2
Attack Bonus +1
Whenever Winter Wolf attacks, tap target creature you don't control.

Cost = 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 1
Whenever Wolf Cub attacks, another target Wolf you control gets +1 attack bonus until end of turn.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 2
Other Wolf creatures you control get +1 attack bonus and enter with an additional endurance counter.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 3

Cost = 3 Mana, 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 2
Tap: Create a number of Coin tokens equal to the number of Coins you control plus one.

Cost = 5 Sol Mana
Endurance = 2
When Emarengar, Lord of Dayfall enters play, destroy all non-Sol creatures you control. Create a token that's a copy of each of them where they were, except those tokens are Goldenite in addition to their other types and the Mana in their costs is replaced with Sol Mana.

Cost = 3 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Search your deck for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Terra Mana
Endurance = 1
Monkey Horde gets +2 attack bonus for each space Monkeys you control have moved this turn.
A deck can have any number of cards named Monkey Horde.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Action cards in your hand have reactive.

Cost = 3 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Whenever an opponent plays a card, you may play a card from your hand with the same card type and the same mana value without paying its costs.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Destroy a creature you control: Add 1 Lun Mana.

Cost = 3 Mana
If a player would draw a card, that player draws two cards instead.

Cost = 4 Mana
At the beginning of your end step, untap each card you control.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Lun Mana
You may activate abilities as reacts.

Cost = 3 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
When Two Truths and a Lie enters play, you gain 20 information. Reveal your hand. Name a card not in your hand.
You can't win the game from the information win condition.
Two Truths and a Lie can't be destroyed or swapped with unless you've played a card with the chosen name this turn.
Whenever you play a card with the chosen name, destroy Two Truths and a Lie.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Until end of turn, you may pay information as if it was Mana.

Cost = X Mana, 2 Astra Mana
Target opponent loses X life and you gain X life.

Cost = 1 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Add two Mana in any combination of alignments.
Draw a card.

Cost = 1 Lun Mana
Endurance = 1
Master Ritualist taps for two Lun mana while in your sanctum.
If Master Ritualist would tap for mana, you may destroy a creature you control. If you don't, it doesn't tap for mana. [i](It doesn't become tapped.)[/i]

Cost = 7 Mana
Endurance = 7

Cost = 1 Astra Mana, Destroy a creature you control
Add 3 Astra Mana.

Cost = X Mana, 1 Lun Mana
Put target creature card from your discard pile into play in your front row.

Cost = 2 Mana, 1 Astra Mana
Each opponent loses X life, where X is the number of cards you've played this turn [i](including this)[/i].

Cost = 7 Mana, 1 Sol Mana, 1 Lun Mana, 1 Astra Mana, 1 Terra Mana.
Endurance = 7
When Titan of Equilibrium enters, move all endurance counters from creatures in your front row onto Titan of Equilibrium.
Remove three endurance counters from Titan of Equilibrium: Draw a card.

Cost = 1 Lun Mana
Reactive
Put target creature in play into its owner's hand.

Cost = 1 Astra Mana
Reactive
Draw two cards, then discard two cards.

Cost = 1 Sol Mana
Endurance = 1
When Hunted Loyalist dies, create a Coin token.

Cost = 1 Astra Mana
Endurance = 1
When Void Vessel dies, add 2 Mana.
